summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Panel for Only Great Pizza Map Paris. All CRUD operations working correctly. Fixed missing /admin route in App.js. Backend API tests: 15/15 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All features verified working.
passed_tests: Admin panel loads correctly at /admin route
Admin panel displays list of all 43 pizzerias
Search functionality filters pizzerias by name
Search functionality filters pizzerias by neighborhood
Add new pizzeria form opens via 'Add Pizzeria' button
Edit existing pizzeria loads correct data into form
Delete pizzeria with confirmation dialog works
Form validation requires name and address fields
Badges can be added and removed
Back button navigates to home page
POST /api/pizzerias is idempotent (updates existing by name)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /admin route was missing from App.js - added import and route for Admin component
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.jsx - Added data-testid attributes for better testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. All CRUD operations tested. The /admin route was missing and has been added. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_crud.py cover all pizzeria CRUD endpoints. POST endpoint is idempotent - checks by name to prevent duplicates.

fixes_applied.issue: Admin page not loading - route missing
fixes_applied.fix: Added Admin import and Route in /app/frontend/src/App.js
